title: Packet 065 And Packet 066 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the Packet 065 and Packet 066 authority tranche through the parent-root boundary and restore `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity so the consolidated Olares workspace authority surface is durable on the host mirror rather than workstation-local only.
dependency_note: Packet 065 selected the current authority-consolidation slice and Packet 066 executed it locally. This gate records publication to the GitHub-canonical parent-root boundary and restoration of the authoritative host mirror to clean parity.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 068 - Post-067 Host Workflow Hardening Follow-On Decision
